plugins.description: Plugin de desenvolvimento disciplinado com conhecimentos de programador senior. v7.5.0 — System Design Coverage Gaps: fecha os 3 buracos de System Design via sintese de corpus senior (32 fontes). Onda 1 Filas/Mensageria (3 references novas + secao 9), Onda 2 SQL-internals + DNS-routing (3 references SQL + EXPLAIN/particionamento PostgreSQL + 7 politicas Route 53), Onda 3 Resiliencia (enriquecimento, zero reference nova: defensive-patterns, system-design secao 11, infrastructure blue-green). 9 conflitos senior resolvidos via tensao+regra; toda afirmacao citada; advisor lista defensive-patterns + infrastructure. v7.4.0 — Skill Parity Refresh: code-reviewer + ~81 grafts em 19 skills/3 agents. v7.3.0 — Next.js Stack Knowledge: 15 atoms (94% rastreabilidade).
